product_overview: BASE44 is a metadata-driven, no-code ERP for industrial operations that lets users navigate modules (sales, inventory, production, finance, CRM), define entities and workflows, and manage records through a dynamic UI. The app exposes module pages, a metadata studio and workflow builder to configure behavior without changing code.
core_goals: Authenticate and access the ERP dashboard to work across modules
Navigate between modules (Vendas, Estoque, Produção, Financeiro, etc.) and open module pages
Create and manage metadata-driven entities and their records without code
View and manage transactional data such as sales orders, inventory products and financial receivables/payables
Configure and run workflows that control business process transitions

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allow users to sign in with email and password to access protected ERP pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Submit login form -> See success toast and be redirected to /
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input with incorrect credentials -> Submit login form -> See inline error and failure toast

features.name: Session and Route Guarding
features.description: Protect application routes by validating session; redirect unauthenticated users to login and allow authenticated users into the dashboard.
user_flows: Open the app at / -> See a loading spinner while auth is checked -> If authenticated, see dashboard at /
Open the app at / -> See a loading spinner while auth is checked -> If not authenticated, be redirected to /login

features.name: Module Navigation (ERP Layout)
features.description: Navigate across ERP modules using the main layout and open specific module pages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the Vendas module from the main layout -> Confirm the URL updates to /vendas/pedidos -> See the sales orders list load
Navigate to / -> Open the Estoque module from the main layout -> Confirm the URL updates to /estoque/produtos -> See the products catalog load

features.name: Metadata Studio (Create and manage entities)
features.description: Create and edit entity definitions (entities and fields) that drive dynamic pages and forms across the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /configuracoes/metadata-studio -> Start a new entity definition by entering code, name and type -> Add one or more fields with data types and required flags -> Save entity -> See confirmation and the new entity listed in the metadata studio
Navigate to /configuracoes/metadata-studio -> Start a new entity definition without providing a required code -> Attempt to save entity -> See inline validation errors preventing save

features.name: Dynamic Entities (metadata-driven records)
features.description: Open and interact with lists and forms generated from entity metadata; search, filter and open individual records.
user_flows: Navigate to /configuracoes/metadata-studio -> Select an entity by name to open its records list -> Use filters/search to narrow results -> Open a record to view or edit its fields
Navigate to /configuracoes/metadata-studio -> Select an entity by name to open its records list -> Use filters/search that return no results -> See an empty-state indicating no records found

features.name: Sales Orders (Pedidos de Venda)
features.description: View, search and open details for sales orders to manage commercial transactions.
user_flows: Navigate to /vendas/pedidos -> See the sales orders list with recent orders -> Apply a filter or search to narrow orders -> Open an order detail view
Navigate to /vendas/pedidos -> Apply a filter that yields no orders -> See empty-state indicating no matching orders

features.name: Products Catalog (Estoque)
features.description: Inspect and search the products catalog, view product details and check stock-related information.
user_flows: Navigate to /estoque/produtos -> See the products list and key stock information -> Use filters/search to find a specific product -> Open the product record to view details

features.name: Finance (Accounts Receivable & Payable)
features.description: Inspect accounts receivable and payable lists, filter items and open payment/invoice details for reconciliation and actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /financeiro/receber -> See accounts receivable items -> Apply a date or status filter -> Open an item to view payment details
Navigate to /financeiro/pagar -> See accounts payable items -> Apply a date or supplier filter -> Open an item to view payment details

features.name: Workflow Builder
features.description: Create and configure workflows with steps and transitions that will control entity lifecycle and approvals.
user_flows: Navigate to /configuracoes/workflows -> Create a new workflow by defining steps and allowed transitions -> Assign approver roles to steps -> Save workflow -> See the new workflow listed
Navigate to /configuracoes/workflows -> Start creating a workflow without assigning approver roles for a step -> Attempt to save workflow -> See inline validation errors requiring approver roles

features.name: Reports Hub
features.description: Open the reports hub to view available reports and apply basic filters for export or inspection.
user_flows: Navigate to /relatorios -> See the list of available reports -> Open a report -> Apply a date range filter -> See the report data update

routes.description: Dynamic entity page driven by metadata

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate via email/password and open the ERP dashboard
user_interactions: See success toast and be redirected to "/"
See inline error and toast if invalid credentials

features.name: Session and Route Guarding
features.description: Protect all application routes (except /login) by checking session and redirecting when needed
user_interactions: See a loading spinner while auth is checked
Get redirected to login if not authenticated

features.name: Module Navigation (ERP Layout)
features.description: Navigate across ERP modules via the main layout (sidebar/header) and open module pages
user_interactions: Use the sidebar to open a module page (e.g. Vendas, Estoque, Produção, Financeiro)
Confirm the URL updates and the corresponding page loads

features.name: Dynamic Entities (Metadata-driven pages)
features.description: Open a dynamic entity page by route parameter and interact with metadata-based UI
user_interactions: Navigate to a specific entity page (e.g. /entidades/clientes)
Use filters/search (if available) and open an entity record

features.name: Sales Orders (Pedidos de Venda)
features.description: View and manage sales orders with filtering and detail views
user_interactions: Open order details (if available in UI)

features.name: Finance (Accounts Receivable/Payable)
features.description: Manage financeiro pages like Contas a Receber and Contas a Pagar
user_interactions: Open accounts receivable page and inspect items
Open accounts payable page and inspect items
Apply filters and open detail dialogs (when available)

known_limitations.issue: In Vite development mode, src/services/api.js returns mocked data and does not call real backend endpoints.
known_limitations.impact: UI flows may pass without a live backend; production behavior differs.

known_limitations.issue: Most routes are wrapped by permission checks (PermissaoRoute); missing permissions may block navigation depending on user profile.
known_limitations.impact: Some module pages may be inaccessible for certain users during tests.
